_comment: Semantic fallback aliases only. Use when an input should approximate to an existing canonical scene.

notes.rainy_bus_stop: Fallback to the closest rainy urban exterior when the exact bus-stop scene is unavailable.
notes.luxury_hotel_room: Fallback to an intimate private-room scene when the hotel-room scene is unavailable.
notes.elegant_dining_room: Fallback to a dining-adjacent social scene when the exact formal room is unavailable.
notes.luxury_bathroom: Fallback to a private luxury interior when the bathroom scene is unavailable.
notes.bamboo_forest: Fallback to a nature fantasy forest only as an approximate substitute.
notes.suburban_neighborhood: Fallback to a cold outdoor residential street when the exact suburban scene is unavailable.
notes.rural_town_street: Fallback to a cold town street when the exact rural street scene is unavailable.
